response: The finance department issued a year-end audit preparation email notifying stakeholders that the company’s annual audit will commence on January 15, and outlining four mandatory pre-audit tasks: finalize Q4 revenue recognition, reconcile all bank accounts, verify stock option records, and prepare related-party transaction disclosures. A controller meeting scheduled for next Tuesday will be held to assign specific responsibilities for each of the pre-audit checklist items, ensuring all required work is completed ahead of the audit’s launch.
